headline: Robinhood’s TradePMR Scores a Recruiting Win With a $3 Billion Wells Fargo Team
summary: TradePMR, now a unit of Robinhood, provides technology and custodial support to approximately 400 registered investment advisory firms.

headline: More Citi shareholders vote 'no' on say-on-pay
summary: Support for Citi's annual say-on-pay resolution fell steeply, with about 60% of shareholders voting in favor of the bank's 2025 executive-compensation program. The decline is likely related to a one-time equity award to CEO Jane Fraser and concerns about how the bank determines incentive pay.

headline: Amazon Price Target Nudged to $312 at Wells Fargo: The AWS Cloud Monetization Story Just Got Bigger
summary: Wells Fargo trimmed its price target on Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) to $312 from $313 while maintaining an Overweight rating. The firm’s reinforced conviction is that AWS sits at the center of the cloud compute monetization story now driving Wall Street’s biggest re-rating debate. For watchful investors, the call frames Amazon stock as a core AI infrastructure ... Amazon Price Target Nudged to $312 at Wells Fargo: The AWS Cloud Monetization Story Just Got Bigger

headline: Marvell Price Target Vaults to $195 at Wells Fargo on AWS Trainium and Custom Silicon Momentum
summary: Wells Fargo delivered one of the most aggressive price target revisions on a major AI semiconductor name this quarter. The firm raised its price target on Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL) to $195 from $135 and reiterated an Overweight rating, anchoring the call on AWS Trainium deployment and broadening custom silicon momentum. The price target raise lands ... Marvell Price Target Vaults to $195 at Wells Fargo on AWS Trainium and Custom Silicon Momentum

headline: Wells Fargo Settlement Fund Reshapes Legal Overhang And Mortgage Growth Story
summary: Wells Fargo (NYSE:WFC) has agreed to settle a discrimination lawsuit by creating a $100 million mortgage assistance fund. The fund will focus on low and moderate income borrowers across more than 50 U.S. regions. The program is scheduled to launch by the end of the summer as part of the court approved settlement. For investors watching NYSE:WFC, the settlement and new fund come as the stock trades around $74.55, with a return of 95.0% over 3 years and 82.4% over 5 years. Over shorter...
